title: Commissioner Šuica discusses the Pact for the Mediterranean with the youth
content: Tomorrow, Commissioner for the Mediterranean Dubravka Šuica, together with Marilena Raouna, Cyprus' Deputy Minister for European Affairs, will engage in a discussion with 30 young leaders from the Southern Mediterranean.

title: Second meeting of the Talent for Innovation Attraction Platform
content: Experts from EU countries working on migration, education and research, representatives from universities, national research centres, and other stakeholders exchanged on the attraction and retention of international students and researchers.
snippet: Experts from EU countries working on migration, education and research, representatives from universities, national research centres, and other stakeholders exchanged on the attraction and retention

title: Safety and health at work belongs on Europe’s skills agenda
content: Occupational safety and health belong on Europe’s skills agenda. See how EU-OSHA’s OSHVET and OiRA help embed prevention in vocational education and lifelong learning for safer and healthier working lives.
snippet: Occupational safety and health belong on Europe’s skills agenda. See how EU-OSHA’s OSHVET and OiRA help embed prevention in vocational education and lifelong learning for safer and healthier working

title: EU-South Africa mark 30 years of research and innovation cooperation
content: The EU and South Africa celebrated 30 years of bilateral research and innovation cooperation and focused on the evolution of this key partnership.
snippet: The EU and South Africa celebrated 30 years of bilateral research and innovation cooperation and focused on the evolution of this key partnership.

title: Commission welcomes political agreement to simplify rules for the chemicals sector
content: The European Commission welcomes the provisional political agreement reached between the European Parliament and the Council of the EU on its Chemicals Omnibus proposal.
snippet: The European Commission welcomes the provisional political agreement reached between the European Parliament and the Council of the EU on its Chemicals Omnibus proposal.

title: Finland and Sweden prepare procurement of Arctic mobility vehicles developed under the European Defence Fund-supported FAMOUS project
content: Today, at the Eurosatory 2026 exhibition in Paris, the Finnish Defence Forces and the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) signed an Implementation Arrangement to cooperate on preparations for the procurement of the Patria TRACKX tracked armoured personnel carrier, designed for operations i

title: Mediterranean Algae: restoring ports and coastal waters with BlueInvest
content: Mediterranean Algae, a Spanish company tackles nutrient pollution in ports and coastal waters. Its system uses algae to clean seawater. It also provides reliable real-time data on water quality. This helps ports meet EU requirements and reduce their environmental impact.
snippet: Mediterranean Algae, a Spanish company tackles nutrient pollution in ports and coastal waters. Its system uses algae to clean seawater. It also provides reliable real-time data on water quality. This

title: Europe's bathing waters remain safe to swim
content: The vast majority met the EU's ‘excellent' bathing quality standards in 2025, according to a new European Environment Agency report.
snippet: The vast majority met the EU's ‘excellent' bathing quality standards in 2025, according to a new European Environment Agency report.

title: In focus: Improving the energy performance of buildings
content: This article takes a look at the many benefits of improving the energy performance of buildings and highlights the work that is already under way across the EU.
snippet: This article takes a look at the many benefits of improving the energy performance of buildings and highlights the work that is already under way across the EU.

title: Who are Europe’s next gender equality champions? Applications are now open
content: Research and innovation news alert: For the first time, this edition expands eligibility to organisations active in research and innovation from countries currently holding candidate status for EU accession.

title: EU and Montenegro close accession negotiations on freedom of movement of workers and consumer and health protection
content: Today, the 27th meeting of the Accession Conference with Montenegro provisionally closed accession negotiations on chapters 2 (freedom of movement for workers) and 28 (consumer and health protection).
snippet: Today, the 27th meeting of the Accession Conference with Montenegro provisionally closed accession negotiations on chapters 2 (freedom of movement for workers) and 28 (consumer and health protection).

title: Egypt and EU join forces on €690 million clean-energy grid investment
content: The partnership will modernise the national electricity network and accelerate renewable-energy integration in the context of the Trans-Mediterranean Renewable Energy and Clean-Tech Cooperation Initiative (T-MED), a flagship initiative of the Pact for the Mediterranean...
snippet: The partnership will modernise the national electricity network and accelerate renewable-energy integration in the context of the Trans-Mediterranean Renewable Energy and Clean-Tech Cooperation

title: Launch of Call for Experts to join the RAISE High-Level Academic Advisory Board
content: Applications are open. Join the RAISE High-Level Academic Advisory Board as an expert in AI Science.
snippet: Applications are open. Join the RAISE High-Level Academic Advisory Board as an expert in AI Science.

title: EU space operators complete their civilian and military requirements on Space Traffic Management
content: 21 EU (and Norwegian) civilian spacecraft operators from start-ups to major companies and their 14 military counterparts coordinated by the European Defence Agency (EDA) agreed on the final version of the Report aggregating civilian and military requirements of space operators on space traffic manag

title: Commission launches two calls for evidence on the future ocean and water research and innovation strategy
content: The future Ocean and Water Research and Innovation (R&I) Strategy is expected to be presented by the end of 2026.
snippet: The future Ocean and Water Research and Innovation (R&I) Strategy is expected to be presented by the end of 2026.
